title: MotifRecord
description: A recurring visual structure identified across multiple Pass 1 records.

elements.description: Specific observable elements that define this motif

source_record_ids.description: IDs of interpretation records where this motif appears

variation_notes.description: Structural variation across instances — position, scale, medium, configuration only

confidence.description: Confidence that these are genuinely the same structural element across records

prompt_pack.description: Image generation prompts derived from this motif

obsidian_note_path.description: Relative path to the visual study page in the Obsidian vault
